name: Identify Enabled vs Disabled Controls
description: Given a screenshot showing a form or control panel, identify which controls or regions appear enabled (interactive) versus disabled (grayed out or non-interactive).

input.prompt: Analyze this screenshot. Identify any UI controls visible. Which controls appear enabled and interactive? Which appear disabled or grayed out? Describe the visual distinction you observe.

scripted_response.answer: The screenshot shows two distinct regions. The left half contains controls that appear enabled and interactive — they are rendered with normal brightness and full contrast. The right half contains controls that appear disabled or inactive — they are visibly dimmed or grayed out compared to the left side, indicating they are not currently interactive.
scripted_response.suggested_action: interact with the enabled controls on the left side
